ddls:
CREATE TABLE "outflows" (
  "outflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outflow measurement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "flow" REAL /* Flow rate measured (in cubic meters per second) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., outflow) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the specific sensor used for the measurement */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity of the water */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen level in the water */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity of the water */,
  "nitrate_level" REAL /* Nitrate level in the water */,
  "phosphate_level" REAL /* Phosphate level in the water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outflows_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., river, lake, ocean) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., outflow, inflow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the measurement type */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the measurement is taken (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high temperature, low flow) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving notifications */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert the user wishes to be notified about */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Setting indicating whether notifications are enabled */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_notified" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last notified */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_acquisition" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data acquisition event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where data was collected */,
  "data_collected" REAL /* Amount of data collected (in bytes) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score for the collected data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_acquisition_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assurance record */,
  "outflow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outflow measurement being checked */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "is_quality_acceptable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the quality of data is acceptable */,
  "quality_assurance_level" TEXT /* Level of quality assurance (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  "quality_assurance_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the quality assurance process */,
  "quality_assurance_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality assurance check */,
  "quality_assurance_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality assurance (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_outflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("outflow_id") REFERENCES outflows ("outflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "outflow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outflow measurement analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for analysis (e.g., Python, R) */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_outflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("outflow_id") REFERENCES outflows ("outflow_id")
)
